## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Bruno Santilli and Aabid Mohamed, discussing Bruno's new role at growthx.ai and Aabid's job search.](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bruno recently joined growthx.ai, an AI-driven content marketing company growing rapidly (3M to 7-8M revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Growthx.ai creates AI-powered workflow streams and agents for content creation, turning brands into publishers](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Aabid was laid off from VRAM and is currently job hunting, open to opportunities outside the energy sector](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Both expressed interest in staying connected and potentially collaborating or referring opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

## Topics

### Bruno's New Role at growthx.ai

  - [Recently joined growthx.ai after leaving previous position](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Company creates AI-powered workflow streams and agents for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Aim to turn brands into publishers, enhancing organic traffic and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Base package starts at $9,000/month, offering access to expert team and AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Company grew from 10 to 50 employees in 3 months, revenue from $3M to $7-8M](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### growthx.ai's Approach and Services

  - [Uses AI to create deep research and content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Focuses on organic traffic growth, turning brand leaders into influencers](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Offers services like podcast transcript conversion to content](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Developing AI agents for tasks like candidate screening (1000 applicants to top 10)](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Working on creating demo materials to better showcase their offerings](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

### Aabid's Current Situation

  - [Laid off from VRAM in October (30% of company laid off)](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Actively job hunting, had interviews but hasn't secured a position yet](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Taking night classes in liberal arts and science with a minor in communications](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Open to opportunities outside the energy sector](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Previous role at VRAM involved client experience, training, and change management](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)

### Industry Insights

  - [Discussion on the volatility of the oil and gas industry](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Mention of potential financial crisis and market unpredictability](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Bruno's transition from oil and gas to AI, viewing it as a growing market](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to send Aabid more detailed information and examples of growthx.ai's work](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Aabid to review the position posted by Jason Gong at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Both to stay in touch regarding potential opportunities or collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Aabid to consider sharing his micro-learning strategy examples with Bruno for potential use at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/RTvsLxp4izP6NNu3VSwqb1W1HUvnJbiw?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
